FAQs.Question: What is MyBotify?
FAQs.Answer: MyBotify AI is an advanced Shopify-integrated platform that revolutionizes campaign creation through AI-driven automation. Designed to enhance marketing efficiency, it enables users to log in, interact with an intelligent AI assistant, and receive tailored campaign suggestions based on special occasions, trending themes, and customer preferences. By analyzing business needs and market trends, MyBotify AI crafts compelling marketing strategies that align with user goals. The platform streamlines the entire campaign creation process, from ideation to execution, ensuring personalized and impactful engagement with target audiences.

FAQs.Question: What benefits will MyBotify bring to my online store?
FAQs.Answer: MyBotify enhances your marketing efforts by using AI to generate personalized campaign suggestions, optimizing engagement for special occasions and trends. It simplifies campaign creation, saves time, and improves customer reach across multiple platforms like Facebook, Instagram, and Google.

FAQs.Question: Is MyBotify GDPR-compliant?
FAQs.Answer: Yes, MyBotify is fully GDPR-compliant. We prioritize data privacy and ensure that all user and customer information is securely processed and handled in accordance with GDPR regulations.

FAQs.Question: Does MyBotify collect and store data from my online store?
FAQs.Answer: MyBotify only accesses necessary store data to generate effective marketing campaigns. We do not misuse any sensitive information. Data privacy and security remain our top priorities.

FAQs.Question: Can I create single or multiple campaigns for Facebook, Instagram, or Google?
FAQs.Answer: Yes, MyBotify allows you to create both single and multiple campaigns across Facebook, Instagram, and Google. You can customize campaigns based on your marketing goals and target audience.

FAQs.Question: How long does it take to set up a campaign with MyBotify?
FAQs.Answer: Setting up a campaign with MyBotify is quick and efficient. With AI-driven recommendations, you can launch a campaign within minutes after selecting your preferred settings.

FAQs.Question: Do you provide human agent support and a ticket system for handling inquiries or issues?
FAQs.Answer: Yes, MyBotify offers dedicated human agent support and a ticketing system to assist with inquiries or technical issues, ensuring a seamless user experience.

FAQs.Question: Do I need to manage campaign funds directly within MyBotify?
FAQs.Answer: No, MyBotify assists in campaign creation and management, but payments and fund allocation are handled through the respective advertising platforms (Facebook, Instagram, Google).

FAQs.Question: What subscription plans are available for MyBotify?
FAQs.Answer: We offer multiple subscription plans tailored to different business needs, including basic, premium, and enterprise options. Each plan provides varying levels of features and campaign capabilities.

FAQs.Question: Is there a refund policy for MyBotify services?
FAQs.Answer: Yes, we have a refund policy based on specific terms and conditions. If you encounter any issues, our support team will assist you in resolving them or processing eligible refunds.

FAQs.Question: Are there any discounts available for MyBotify services?
FAQs.Answer: Yes, we offer occasional discounts and promotional offers. Subscribe to our newsletter or check our website for the latest deals and discounts.
